title: Error-BLKANDNBLK: Incorrectly flags unpacked struct fields as mixed assignments

features.name: unpacked_struct_field_independent_assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct where one field is assigned with blocking assignment in an always_comb block and a different field of the same struct is assigned with non-blocking assignment in an always_ff block.

features.name: unpacked_struct_multi_process_field_assign
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct with multiple fields where each field is assigned by a different process (e.g., one by always_comb and another by always_ff), demonstrating that independent struct fields can have different assignment types.
